title: gastrodia agnicellus
intro: Gastrodia agnicellus, also known as the Tiger's Eye or Gastrodia, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to improve blood circulation, reduce inflammation, and treat various respiratory and cardiovascular conditions. The health benefits of Gastrodia agnicellus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of insomnia, anxiety, and depression, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Gastrodia agnicellus is typically prepared as a dried root, which is then used in traditional Chinese medicine to make teas, decoctions, or capsules, although its availability and use are heavily regulated due to over-harvesting and conservation concerns.
